name: Kandji Devices Missing Password Manager
description: Identifies Kandji-managed devices missing an approved password manager
query: SELECT d.device_id, d.device_name, d.user_email FROM kandji_devices d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM kandji_device_apps a WHERE a.device_id = d.device_id AND (LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%1password%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%lastpass%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%bitwarden%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%dashlane%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%keeper%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_name, '')) LIKE '%nordpass%'))
remediation: Deploy an approved password manager (1Password, Bitwarden, LastPass, Dashlane, Keeper, etc.) via Kandji.
